race.comment: ESPRIT DU JOUR (1) is in the premier metro stable and is busting to win. Has missed a nose at both Eagle Farm and Toowoomba her last two and can take this out with average luck in the run. LAMBERTINA (3) resumes and creates plenty of interest. Has switched from a Sydney barn and has done enough to say this is winnable. Has had a soft trial and just missed at Gosford at her only fresh. She draws well, and Lloyd is booked. The betting will be key. PRIVATE SHOWTIME (11) peaks and has been below her best in better Maidens. Finally has an inside gate which she can use. Has a handy 2kg claim and consider. GERRY'S PICK (6) is a local on resumption and has trialled well at the track. Has a low gate and enough ability to feature if presented forward this time around. SO BE INSPIRED (4) made good improvement, winning a 50 at Ballina over shorter and tumbles in weight this grade with the 4kg claim atop. That should have her in the mix.
